description: AISDLC-115.4 AC #7 — vague issue created → DoR comment posted → author edits → re-check → admitted as ready. This fixture is the BEFORE state (vague body). The post-edit AFTER state is asserted programmatically in pipeline-cli/src/dor/comment-loop.test.ts and ingress-claude.test.ts (re-check with the fixed body flips the verdict to admit and shows the comment is updated, not duplicated).
